zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath於1395年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾時，他的父親Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland48歲，母親Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan22歲。他於大約1422年與Catherine Chalmer結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1456年11月15日在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath于1395年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾时，他的父亲Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland48岁，母亲Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan22岁。他于大约1422年与Catherine Chalmer结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1456年11月15日在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutherland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness): habitational name from the Scottish county of Sutherland, named with Old Norse súthr ‘south, southern’ + land ‘land’ because the territory lay south of Scandinavia and the Norse colonies in the Orkney and Shetland Islands.
History: This is the name of a Highland Scottish clan associated with the county of Sutherland.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath was born in 1395, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland, was 48 and his mother, Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, was 22. He married Catherine Chalmer about 1422. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 15 November 1456, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath est né en 1395, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Chalmer environ 1422. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1456, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath 1395 in Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland 48 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan 22. Er hat um 1422 Catherine Chalmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 15. November 1456 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath è nato il nel 1395 nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Chalmer circa 1422. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 novembre 1456, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeathが1395年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherlandは48歳，母Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchanは22歳であった。約1422年にCatherine Chalmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1456年11月15日にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath(이)가 1395년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1422년 Catherine Chalmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1456년 11월 15일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath nasceu em 1395, em Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Chalmer aproximadamente 1422. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1456, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath родился в 1395 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Chalmer около 1422 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 15 ноября 1456 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath nació en 1395, en Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Catherine Chalmer aproximadamente 1422. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1456, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años.
